issue: 0% recall - skill never triggered for should-trigger queries despite 100% precision on should-not-trigger
root_cause: Description was 250+ words in single paragraph. System truncates to ~20 words in skill list, losing all trigger phrases.
fix_applied: Rewrote description to 2 concise paragraphs (~100 words total). Front-loaded document types and frameworks. Used YAML multiline for readability.
optimization_loop_status: automated loop failed due to missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY - manual optimization applied instead
